name: @kolm/quantize-worker
description: Isolated kolm quantization worker. Heavy ML deps (bitsandbytes / auto-gptq / autoawq / aqlm / quip-sharp / exllamav2 / hqq / efficient_qat / torch / accelerate) live HERE, not in the root package. Root kolm install stays light; tenants opt in to the worker (and to individual methods) when they have the toolchain. Per-method doctor lets a tenant with only bitsandbytes + hqq run int4/int8/hqq without needing the rest.

python.note: Install in a separate Python venv. `requires` is the union of every pip-clean dep across all 10 methods (mirrors the distill worker shape so kolm tooling can introspect uniformly). The Node entrypoint probes each method's deps independently — `node quantize.mjs --doctor --json` returns ready_by_method so a tenant only needs the libs for the methods they actually run. AQLM / QuIP# / EfficientQAT also need a repo checkout via env var (per_method names them explicitly); those are intentionally OUT of requires because pip cannot install them cleanly.
